prompt: ELI5 what a database index is

assertions.text: Contains no technical jargon (query, B-tree, schema, SQL, optimize, table, column, row in technical sense)
Uses at least one concrete, child-friendly analogy (e.g., book, toy box, library, playground)
Sentences are short and simple, average under 15 words per sentence
Tone is warm, playful, and appropriate for a 5-year-old (not condescending)
